title: Grenoble, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Grenoble, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Grenoble is a city in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes with a population of 160,000. The capital of the French Alps, a world-leading research and innovation hub surrounded by spectacular mountain scenery.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
